contentBlocks.original:
मूकं करोति वाचालं पंगुं लंघयते गिरि ।
यत् कृपा तमहं वंदे परमानंद माधवम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mūkaṃ karoti vācālaṃ paṃguṃ laṃghayate giri .
yat kṛpā tamahaṃ vaṃde paramānaṃda mādhavam ..
contentBlocks.translation: I salute that supreme bliss, Madhava, by whose mercy the dumb become most eloquent and the lame are able to jump over the mountains.
contentBlocks.meanings: मूकं (mūkaṃ) – dumb; करोति (karoti) – makes; वाचालं (vācālaṃ) – eloquent; पंगुं (paṅguṃ) – lame; लंघयते (laṅghayate) – makes jump; गिरि (giri) – mountain; यत् (yat) – by whose; कृपा (kṛpā) – mercy; तमहं (tamahaṃ) – that I (tam:that | aham:I); वंदे (vande) – salute; परमानंद (paramānanda) – supreme bliss (parama:supreme | ānanda:bliss); माधवम् (mādhavam) – Madhava;
